title: MLA
desc: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Rathnan Prapancha
desc: Rathnakara is a middle-class man in his late twenties who is unhappy with his life choices. One day, he gets a startling call that turns his world upside down.

title: Subrahmanyapuram
desc: Karthik, an atheist, visits a temple in a remote village and witnesses multiple cases of suicides that are considered as will of God. However, things become complicated when he investigates them.

title: Rider
desc: As love blossoms between orphans Chinnu and Kitty, fate separates them as children. However, they grow up yearning to find each other.

title: Victory
desc: The daughter of a farmer is determined to become an international cricketer despite facing numerous challenges to make her father feel content.

title: Raju Kannada Medium
desc: Raju, a village boy, travels to Bengaluru in search of a better job. Along the way, he faces numerous challenges that teach him valuable life lessons.
